overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy, gas-lit historic city street at night. The character traverses cobblestone roads with tram tracks, enters a narrow alleyway between brick buildings, and emerges back onto the main street while passing by a church and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with tram tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cobblestone street with tram tracks, passing under gas lamps and historic balconies

notable_agents.action: figure standing on second-floor balcony overlooking the street

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road with metal tram tracks running down the center, reflecting gas lamp light
multi-story brick building with cast iron balconies and illuminated windows
historic stone facade with wooden shutters and balcony structures
tall cast iron gas lamp post emitting warm yellow light
fabric awnings over shop entrances on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a rain-slicked cobblestone street lined with historic buildings featuring cast iron balconies. Gas lamps cast warm pools of light on the wet ground, and tram tracks run down the center of the road. The atmosphere is quiet with only a few NPCs visible on balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between brick buildings with overhead balconies

events.description: character turns left and enters narrow alleyway between tall brick buildings
character descends short stone staircase in the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow passage, descending stairs, and moving through a covered courtyard area between buildings

entered.detail: tall brick walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow corridor
small wall-mounted gas lanterns providing dim illumination in the alley
wooden balcony structure connecting buildings overhead in the courtyard
stone archway leading from the narrow alley into a small courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character ducks into a narrow alleyway between brick buildings, leaving the rain-exposed street for a sheltered passage. The environment becomes enclosed with brick walls on both sides, dim wall lanterns, and an overhead wooden balcony. The character descends a short staircase and moves through a stone archway into a small courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street with prominent church and commercial buildings

events.description: character exits alley archway back onto open cobblestone street
character turns slightly right while passing the church grounds

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing by a large gothic church on the right and various commercial storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing on street corner near church entrance

entered.detail: large stone church with gothic arches and illuminated entrance, surrounded by iron fence
three-story commercial building with signage and shuttered windows
black iron fence surrounding the church grounds

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the character returns to the open street where a large gothic church dominates the right side of the view. The street is wider here with groups of NPCs gathered near the church entrance. The character continues past commercial buildings and iron street lamps while rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street continuation with street furniture

events.description: rider on horseback crosses the street from right to left ahead of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street passing a street clock on a pole and encountering a horse rider crossing the path

notable_agents.action: horse with rider crossing the street from right to left
horse-drawn carriage parked on the left side of the street

entered.detail: tall pole with circular clock face, positioned on the sidewalk
wooden carriage with large wheels parked on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final stretch shows the character walking past a prominent street clock on a pole while a horse rider crosses ahead. A parked horse-drawn carriage sits on the left side of the wet cobblestone street. The historic commercial buildings continue into the distance as the rain maintains its steady fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic city that shifts from an open main thoroughfare into a confined alleyway before returning to a bustling urban square. It begins on a cobblestone street where gas lamps cast warm pools of light over tram tracks and buildings with cast iron balconies. As the character ducks away from the open road, the environment becomes enclosed within a narrow brick alleyway, passing under wooden balconies and through a stone archway into a small courtyard. The scene then expands back onto the wider street, where the view is dominated by a large gothic church and groups of pedestrians gathered in the rain. Finally, the camera moves past a prominent street clock and a parked horse-drawn carriage as the character continues along the wet cobblestones toward distant commercial buildings.
